arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the routing profile.

default_outbound_queue_id.description: The ID of the default outbound queue for the routing profile.

description.description: A brief description of the routing profile.

id.description: The unique identifier for the routing profile.

media_concurrencies.description: The media channels and their concurrent usage limits for the routing profile.

name.description: The name of the routing profile.

queue_configs.description: Configurations for the queues associated with the routing profile, including channel, delay, and priority.

routing_profile_id.description: The ID of the routing profile.

tags.description: Tags associated with the routing profile for organizational purposes.
